<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Detect constant logical expressions. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if false && connected { start() }
```

## Good

```go
if ready && connected { start() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only constant-logical-expr`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
